title: Turkish Cherry Tomatoes Kebabs
description: A flavorful Turkish dish featuring cherry tomatoes, yuzu-cure, and a low-carb friendly profile, perfect for a crowd-pleasing dinner. The combination of floral and gooey elements creates a unique taste experience.
instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat, about 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together yuzu juice, olive oil, garlic, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the halved cherry tomatoes to the bowl and toss to coat with the yuzu mixture.
Thread the cherry tomatoes onto skewers, leaving a small space between each tomato.
Grill the kebabs for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the tomatoes are tender and lightly charred.
While the kebabs are grilling, mix the crumbly feta cheese with chopped fresh parsley and lemon zest in a small bowl.
Once the kebabs are done, remove them from the grill and top each kebab with a spoonful of the feta mixture.
Serve the Turkish Cherry Tomatoes Kebabs hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
